title: Badland Hunters
tmdbOverview: After a deadly earthquake turns Seoul into a lawless badland, a fearless huntsman springs into action to rescue a teenager abducted by a mad doctor.
synopsis: Released in 2024, Badland Hunters is a action, adventure and thriller film from South Korea. It has a 5.9 rating on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2020s and genre rankings. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
